MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOLLOY, ANNE COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-12-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TABARSI, ABDOL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1355 POST STREET #301, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $2,950.15 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,950.15, STAYED UNTIL AUG-15-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO MAKE PAYMENT OR VACATE BY AUG 15, 1999 PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT FOR ANY AMOUNT OWED PLUS FEES OF $250.00 AND COSTS OF $117.00. IF CONDITIONS COMPLIED WITH, PLAINTIFF SHALL VACATE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.
